title: FeathC2
description: A lightweight yet powerful shader pack featuring reflections, rain puddles, enhanced lighting, atmospheric effects, and cinematic color grading.
body:
### Details

Feath Shader is a lightweight yet visually powerful shader pack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with balanced realism and high performance. Whether you’re exploring vast landscapes or building detailed structures, Feath Shader adds an immersive layer of beauty without compromising on FPS.

✨ Features:

Realistic Reflections → Smooth and accurate reflections on water, glass, and reflective blocks.

Rain Puddles → Dynamic wet surfaces that bring rainy weather to life with puddles forming naturally.

Lighting Enhancements → Soft, natural light with realistic shadows, bloom, and improved torchlight effects.

Atmosphere & Sky → Improved atmosphere rendering with more depth, fog, and vibrant skies.

Color Adjustments & Grading → Balanced tones and cinematic color grading for a polished, professional look.


Feath Shader is made to be lightweight, stable, and visually consistent, perfect for players who want beautiful graphics without sacrificing smooth gameplay.
